name: Space Wolves Speaker of the Dead
titles: Space Wolves Speaker of the Dead
lore: Servants and leaders both of the Cult of Morkai – the Fenrisian wolf-aspect of death – the Speakers of the Dead are the instillers of fear, masters of discipline and keepers of the Legion’s culture and histories. These blood-soaked priests of Fenris enact strange rites, wear esoteric masks and carry curious tokens. Each Speaker of the Dead makes a baleful oath before battle, and its chanted memetics can take root within the minds of the Legion, providing deadly results.

modelDefinitions.name: Speaker of the Dead with Jump Pack

wargearOptions.description: This Model may have its bolt pistol exchanged for one item from the Legion Pistol list.
This Model may have melta bombs selected for it for +5 Points.

specialRules.name: Medic (5+) Speaker of the Dead with Jump Pack
